photo_description: An overhead view of a fully equipped accessible toilet stall with blue mosaic tile walls, featuring fold-down grab bars on both sides, a raised backrest, an emergency pull cord, and a wall-mounted soap dispenser.

findings.observation: Wall-mounted, wall-hung toilet with a raised backrest/support panel visible. The toilet appears to be at a standard-to-raised accessible height.
findings.estimated_measure: approximately 45–50 cm seat height from floor

findings.observation: Two fold-down (swing-down) grab bars are installed on both the left and right sides of the toilet, each equipped with coloured push-button controls (yellow and blue) at the ends, consistent with electro-mechanical or assistive fold-down bar systems.
findings.estimated_measure: bars appear to extend approximately 70–80 cm from wall, positioned at roughly 75–85 cm height when horizontal

findings.observation: An emergency pull cord (red cord) is visible on the right-hand side wall, hanging down to near floor level, which is a required accessible facility feature for emergency assistance.
A wall-mounted soap/hand sanitiser dispenser is installed on the left wall at what appears to be a reachable height for a seated user.
Toilet paper holder is integrated into the left grab bar assembly, keeping it within easy reach of a seated user without requiring leaning or stretching.
A wall-mounted flush plate (push-button type) is positioned on the rear wall above the toilet cistern, reachable from a seated position.
The floor is large-format grey/dark ceramic tile with visible grout lines and a floor drain grate in the lower-right corner. Surface appears smooth and may present moderate slip risk when wet.
A handheld shower/bidet hose attachment is mounted on the right wall beside the toilet, providing additional hygiene access for users who cannot easily transfer.
Clear floor space is visible on both sides of the toilet, suggesting adequate lateral transfer space for wheelchair users on either side.
findings.estimated_measure: approximately 80–100 cm clearance visible on the right side
